_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop a method for comparing collection reports to outstanding requirements to identify information gaps.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality dimensions and how to assess, measure, and document quality issues within a specific data domain.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-003 (AB, cosine: 0.487), DQ-S-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.513). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [collection, comparing, develop, gaps, identify, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [assess, data, dimensions, document, domain, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.875, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (80.9%). The model interprets "Develop a method for comparing collection reports to outstanding requirements to" as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of data quality dimensions and how to assess, measure, and document qu" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.491 ≈ STS 0.513 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [collection, comparing, develop, gaps, identify, information]. WIDAI terms: [assess, data, dimensions, document, domain, issues].
